message:
🧹 Deduplicate formatThroughput across 3 service mesh cards (#10120)

Extract identical formatThroughput() and its THROUGHPUT_LOCALE_MIN_FRACTION
constant from envoy_status, grpc_status, and linkerd_status into a shared
lib/cards/formatters.ts module. Removes ~18 lines of duplicated code.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
